posts.author: Line_Friis (Line Friis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Can someone help me with how to automate a timeline, when I want to put a year exact to the timeline, when moved to a board.

For example:

We have a board with our annual accounts for each client. Each board represent a year, ex 2023 for one board and 2024 for another board. I would like to make an automation that edits the timeline when moving to another board.

So if I have a timeline that says 01.01.2023-31.12.2023, and when I move this from board named ‘2023’, to the board named ‘2024’, this will automatically ad a year to the timeline, so this will change to 01.01.2024-31.12.2024.

hope someone can help

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

I’m wondering if an automation recipe like the following would work for what you need:

Screen Shot 2023-10-11 at 5.25.02 PM1500×782 49.1 KB

Try it out and let me know what you think!

posts.author: Line_Friis (Line Friis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlotte

thank you for your help, it works only on due date, but not on timeline. I can make it push our duedate on the item, but not the timeline.

image701×189 19.3 KB
